texto: At that moment, he was meaner and madder than he’d ever been, but mainly at himself, which is the worst kind of mean and mad to be, because the only thing to do about it is to take it out on someone else.
explicacao: Citação de Victoria Forester sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “At that moment, he was meaner and madder than he’d ever been, but mainly at himself, which is the…” articula reflexao, insightful, moment em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
